problem_text_cn: 1454 用冷却法测量金属比热容。[可供仪器和用具] 铜、铁、铝样品（直径5 mm、长30 mm小圆柱）、铜-康铜热电偶、加热电炉及升降支架、防风隔离金属筒、冰水混合物及保温瓶、物理天平、数字电压表、秒表等。[要求] (1) 写出冷却法测量金属比热容的原理及实验公式；(2) 已知铜在100℃时比热容$c_1 = 0.3929 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg \cdot ^\circ C}$，测量铁和铝在100℃时的比热容。
problem_text_en: 1454 Measure the specific heat capacity of metals using the cooling method. [Available instruments and tools] Copper, iron, aluminum samples (small cylinders with diameter 5 mm, length 30 mm), copper-constantan thermocouple, heating furnace and lifting support, windproof isolation metal cylinder, ice-water mixture and thermos, physical balance, digital voltmeter, stopwatch, etc. [Requirements] (1) Write down the principle and experimental formula for measuring specific heat capacity of metals using the cooling method; (2) Given that the specific heat capacity of copper at 100℃ is $c_1 = 0.3929 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg \cdot ^\circ C}$, measure the specific heat capacity of iron and aluminum at 100℃.
img_cn: 图1454_1：冷却法测金属比热容装置及数据处理
img_en: Fig. 1454_1: Cooling method for measuring metal specific heat capacity device and data processing
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】相同形状、尺寸和表面状况的金属样品，冷却时$\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = \alpha_1S_1(\theta_1 - \theta_0)^m = c_1M_1\frac{\Delta \theta_1}{\Delta t}$，$\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = \alpha_2S_2(\theta_2 - \theta_0)^m = c_2M_2\frac{\Delta \theta_2}{\Delta t}$，因$S_1=S_2$、$\alpha_1=\alpha_2$、$\theta_1=\theta_2$，得$c_2 = c_1\frac{M_1}{M_2} \cdot \frac{\Delta t_2}{\Delta t_1}$。代入数据：$M_1 = 4.830\ \mathrm{g}$（铜），$\Delta t_1 = 8.38\ \mathrm{s}$；$M_2 = 4.280\ \mathrm{g}$（铁），$\Delta t_2 = 8.89\ \mathrm{s}$，得$c_2 = 0.470 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg \cdot ^\circ C}$；$M_3 = 1.500\ \mathrm{g}$（铝），$\Delta t_3 = 6.31\ \mathrm{s}$，得$c_3 = 0.953 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg \cdot ^\circ C}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】For metal samples with the same shape, size and surface condition, during cooling: $\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = \alpha_1S_1(\theta_1 - \theta_0)^m = c_1M_1\frac{\Delta \theta_1}{\Delta t}$, $\frac{\Delta Q}{\Delta t} = \alpha_2S_2(\theta_2 - \theta_0)^m = c_2M_2\frac{\Delta \theta_2}{\Delta t}$. Since $S_1=S_2$, $\alpha_1=\alpha_2$, $\theta_1=\theta_2$, we get $c_2 = c_1\frac{M_1}{M_2} \cdot \frac{\Delta t_2}{\Delta t_1}$. Substituting data: $M_1 = 4.830\ \mathrm{g}$ (copper), $\Delta t_1 = 8.38\ \mathrm{s}$; $M_2 = 4.280\ \mathrm{g}$ (iron), $\Delta t_2 = 8.89\ \mathrm{s}$, get $c_2 = 0.470 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg \cdot ^\circ C}$; $M_3 = 1.500\ \mathrm{g}$ (aluminum), $\Delta t_3 = 6.31\ \mathrm{s}$, get $c_3 = 0.953 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg \cdot ^\circ C}$.
problem_answer: 铁的比热容：$\boldsymbol{0.470 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg \cdot ^\circ C}}$；铝的比热容：$\boldsymbol{0.953 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg \cdot ^\circ C}}$；测量关键：相同冷却条件下，用标准样品求未知样品比热容。
